macro_context.geopolitical_notes: US Memorial Day holiday — NYSE and Nasdaq are closed all day. No pre-market session, no regular session, no execution possible. Workflow A did not run (research/2026-05-25.json does not exist on GitHub, confirmed). Claude did not propose any trades. Overnight global macro picture is calm: no emergency central bank actions detected, no new major geopolitical escalations in last 24 hours. Background risk remains elevated (trade tensions, Middle East uncertainty per S&P Global April brief) but no acute overnight shock. UK and European markets open normally today; their sessions not relevant as no US trades are possible.

notes: Memorial Day 2026 — US markets closed per NYSE official holiday calendar (Monday May 25, 2026). This is a mandatory HOLD day. No trades can be executed by Manus today.
